description_long: This is a modern luxury house complex featuring a flat-roofed, multi-level main building surrounded by landscaped grounds. The property includes a large, irregularly shaped swimming pool with a patio area, several mature trees, and a full-sized tennis court enclosed by fencing. The house itself has a sleek, geometric design with clean lines, large windows, and a mix of white and dark exterior finishes. There is a driveway with space for multiple vehicles and a garage structure adjacent to the main building. The overall layout is open and spacious, with outdoor recreational amenities integrated into the residential environment.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, pool, patio, and tennis court with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, garage, and the rear of the house with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool area, trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, pool, and tennis court from another angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flat overhang, large glass door, and adjacent driveway
